tutorial_quest.name: First Steps
tutorial_quest.description: Defeat 3 goblins in the Dark Forest to prove your worth as an adventurer.

capture_bandits.name: Bandit Capture
capture_bandits.description: Capture 3 bandits in the Dark Forest to bring them to justice.

forest_cleaning.name: Wolf Problem
forest_cleaning.description: The villagers are worried about wolves attacking travelers. Clear out 5 wolves from the forest.

orc_invasion.name: Orc Menace
orc_invasion.description: Orcs have been spotted in the Deep Woods. Defeat 3 orcs to protect the forest.

ancient_artifact.name: Lost Relic
ancient_artifact.description: An ancient artifact was stolen by bandits. Retrieve it from the Ancient Ruins.

undead_horde.name: Undead Rising
undead_horde.description: Undead creatures have risen in the Underground Tombs. Clear out 5 skeletons.

crystal_guardian.name: Crystal Protector
crystal_guardian.description: Ice Elementals are disrupting the natural balance. Defeat 2 Ice Elementals in the Crystal Caves.

dark_mage_hunt.name: Sorcerer Hunt
dark_mage_hunt.description: A Dark Mage has been causing trouble in the Deep Woods. Defeat the Dark Mage.

troll_slayer.name: Troll Bane
troll_slayer.description: A massive troll has been terrorizing travelers. Defeat the troll in the Underground Tombs.

dragon_slayer.name: Dragon's End
dragon_slayer.description: The legendary Fire Dragon terrorizes the land. Only a true hero can defeat this ancient evil.

treasure_hunter.name: Hidden Riches
treasure_hunter.description: Collect valuable materials: 10 Orc Teeth, 5 Wolf Fangs, and 3 Dark Crystals.

merchant_favor.name: Trading Favor
merchant_favor.description: Help the merchant by bringing 5 Gold Coins and 3 Iron Swords to prove your worth.

shadow_plague.name: Shadow Corruption
shadow_plague.description: Dark shadows have infected the moonlit glade. Defeat 3 shadow knights to cleanse the area.

arcane_scholar.name: Mage's Quest
arcane_scholar.description: Gather 3 Fire Gems and 2 Ice Crystals for the arcane scholar in the Spire of Sorcery.

void_walker.name: Into the Void
void_walker.description: Brave the Void Cavern and defeat all corrupted beings within (3 encounters).

temple_protector.name: Obsidian Oath
temple_protector.description: Cleanse the Obsidian Temple by defeating 4 undead abominations.

frost_mage.name: Ice Master
frost_mage.description: Defeat 4 Ice Elementals and collect 2 Crystalline Wands.

inferno_slayer.name: Flames of Wrath
inferno_slayer.description: Defeat 3 Fire Wraiths to prevent their invasion.

shadow_bow.name: Archer's Training
shadow_bow.description: Face 5 Goblin Archers in the Deep Woods to master ranged combat.

swamp_hunt.name: Swamp Stalker
swamp_hunt.description: The Swamp of Shadows harbors dangerous creatures. Defeat 4 Giant Spiders and 3 Poison Elementals.

hydra_slayer.name: Hydra Hunter
hydra_slayer.description: The legendary Swamp Hydra terrorizes the marshlands. Gather a party and defeat this multi-headed beast.

cemetery_cleansing.name: Grave Duty
cemetery_cleansing.description: The Haunted Cemetery is overrun with spirits. Defeat 5 Ghosts and 3 Wraiths to bring peace to the dead.

necromancer_defeat.name: Necromancer's End
necromancer_defeat.description: The Necromancer Lord Vorthak commands the undead army. Defeat this dark mage to end the curse.

mountain_climb.name: Mountain Trek
mountain_climb.description: Ascend to the Mountain Base and defeat 3 Rock Golems to prove your worth.

thunder_conquest.name: Storm Challenger
thunder_conquest.description: Ascend Thunder Peak and defeat 4 Storm Elementals and 2 Lightning Golems.

giant_slayer.name: Thunder Lord's Fall
giant_slayer.description: Face the mighty Storm Giant Thunder Lord Thorigar atop the mountain.

crypt_explorer.name: Into the Depths
crypt_explorer.description: Descend into the Crypt of Eternity and defeat 3 Death Knights.

lich_king_defeat.name: Eternal Nightmare
lich_king_defeat.description: The Lich King Malachar rules the Crypt of Eternity. Assemble the strongest party to end his undying reign.

demon_gate.name: Infernal Gate
demon_gate.description: The Hellfire Citadel's gates stand open. Defeat 4 Infernal Imps and 2 Hell Knights.

demon_prince_defeat.name: Prince of Darkness
demon_prince_defeat.description: The Demon Prince Azgorath awaits in Hellfire Citadel. Face this ultimate evil.

sky_ascent.name: Ascension
sky_ascent.description: Climb to the Sky Sanctuary and prove your might against 3 Wind Elementals.

elder_dragon_defeat.name: Wind's End
elder_dragon_defeat.description: The Elder Dragon Zephyr guards the Sky Sanctuary. Face this ancient being for ultimate glory.

restore_peace_in_bridagrak_oblast.name: Restore Peace in Brïdagrak Oblast
restore_peace_in_bridagrak_oblast.description: Clear out the lawless Outlaw Lands of Brïdagrak Oblast and restore order.

sabotage_ninja_operations.name: Sabotage operations from Ninja clans
sabotage_ninja_operations.description: Infiltrate the Ninja clans operating in the port and sabotage their plans.

lost_child.name: Lost in the Forest
lost_child.description: Elder Mira's granddaughter went into the Dark Forest and hasn't returned. Find her by defeating the goblins who took her.

stolen_ore.name: The Missing Iron
stolen_ore.description: Blacksmith Torren's iron shipment was stolen by bandits in the forest. Recover it by defeating them.

goblin_cache.name: The Goblin Cache
goblin_cache.description: A lost ranger told you of a goblin stash deep in the forest. Defeat 6 goblins and claim their spoils.

haunted_melody.name: The Haunted Melody
haunted_melody.description: Old Bard Fenwick speaks of a ghost haunting the Ancient Ruins. Defeat the Shadow Knights who torment it.

shadow_seal.name: Break the Shadow Seal
shadow_seal.description: Archaeologist Voss discovered a sealed chamber in the ruins. Break the seal by defeating the Ancient Golems guarding it.

witchs_bargain.name: The Witch's Bargain
witchs_bargain.description: Forest Witch Sylva demands the defeat of the Orc Chieftain as payment for her blessing. Take on the boss.

spirit_at_rest.name: A Spirit at Rest
spirit_at_rest.description: A wandering spirit in the Moonlit Glade cannot find peace. Defeat the Shadow Knights haunting the glade to free them.

sea_route_cleared.name: Clear the Sea Route
sea_route_cleared.description: Captain Drova needs the port approach cleared of bandits and thieves threatening her trade routes.

crystal_bounty.name: Crystal Bounty
crystal_bounty.description: Miner Petra needs help clearing the Crystal Caves. Defeat the Crystal Guardians threatening her crew.

wandering_merchant.name: The Missing Merchant
wandering_merchant.description: A merchant from the village went missing on the road to the ruins. Investigate by clearing out the bandits on the route.

fire_and_ice.name: Fire and Ice
fire_and_ice.description: Elemental forces clash in the Crystal Peaks. Defeat Fire Elementals threatening the sacred ice formations.

void_anomaly.name: Void Anomaly
void_anomaly.description: Strange rifts have opened in the Void Cavern. Seal them by defeating the Void Spawns emerging from within.

coldwater_incursion.name: Coldwater Incursion
coldwater_incursion.description: Varak raiders have crossed the Coldwater River and are threatening the border stations. Defeat 4 raiders before the situation escalates.

treaty_escort.name: The Treaty Messenger
treaty_escort.description: Escort a treaty document safely across the Coldwater Crossing while steppe archers attempt to intercept it. Defeat 3 steppe archers.

test_of_the_steppe.name: Test of the Steppe
test_of_the_steppe.description: To earn the Varak clans' respect you must prove your strength. Defeat 5 clan berserkers on the Iron Steppe.

bear_warrior_challenge.name: The Bear Warrior Challenge
bear_warrior_challenge.description: The Bear Warrior order demands a challenge before allowing outsiders to pass into the Greymount Hold. Defeat 3 Bear Warriors in honourable combat.

healers_request.name: The Healer's Request
healers_request.description: Clan Healer Sigrid needs eastern medicines from Yixuan. Collect 5 Jade Tea (craft or purchase) and bring them to the Greymount Hold.

stolen_examination_scrolls.name: Stolen Scrolls
stolen_examination_scrolls.description: Examination scrolls have been stolen from River's Crown. The thieves are Jade Court Assassins working for a corrupt official. Hunt down 5 of them.

river_bandit_problem.name: River Bandit Problem
river_bandit_problem.description: River bandits have been raiding trade boats on the approach to River's Crown. Clear out 6 river bandits from the docks.

the_black_water_mystery.name: The Black Water
the_black_water_mystery.description: Something has disturbed the ghost river's ancient spirits. Defeat 4 ghost legionnaires and investigate what woke them.

serpents_of_the_deep.name: Serpents of the Deep
serpents_of_the_deep.description: Yi Xuan River Serpents are attacking the ferry crossing at the Ghost River. Defeat 5 to make the river safe.

examination_corruption.name: The Corruption in the Hall
examination_corruption.description: Corrupted scholars embedded in the Examination Hall are feeding answers to wealthy candidates. Root out 4 of them.

automaton_malfunction.name: Automaton Malfunction
automaton_malfunction.description: The jade automata guarding the archive have malfunctioned and are attacking scholars. Disable 3 of them.

spine_crossing.name: The Spine Crossing
spine_crossing.description: Ice elementals are blocking the Spine of Heaven Pass and preventing trade caravans from crossing. Drive back 5 of them.

spirit_of_the_pass.name: Spirit of the Pass
spirit_of_the_pass.description: A lotus spirit guardian has taken up residence in the mountain pass and is demanding tribute from travellers. Drive it off.

recover_the_archive.name: Recover the Archive
recover_the_archive.description: Archaeologist Theodora has found a section of the old Byzantra Imperial Archive beneath Kostantora. Clear out 5 ghost legionnaires so she can excavate safely.

constanplea_revenants.name: The Restless Dead
constanplea_revenants.description: The excavation has awakened Constanplea Revenants — soldiers who died defending the city and cannot accept its fall. Put 4 of them to rest.

corsair_hunt.name: The Corsair Hunt
corsair_hunt.description: Kalovar corsairs have been raiding merchant ships in the harbour. Take down 4 corsairs at the Kostantora Docks.

war_mage_purge.name: Purge of the War Mages
war_mage_purge.description: Kalovar War Mages loyal to the Grand Vizier are eliminating political opponents in the city. Defeat 4 to disrupt their operation.
